---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for RCNA Core
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what does it improve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references.
